name: Governor Johnson's Biscochitos
recipeInstructions: In a large bowl, cream shortening, sugar and anise seed. Add eggs and beat well. Combine flour, baking powder, and salt in another large bowl. Alternately add flour and fruit juice to the creamed mixture until a stiff dough has formed. Knead dough slightly. Pat or roll dough to 1/4 to 1/2 inch thickness. Cut dough into desired shapes. Mix sugar and cinnamon in a shaker. Dust each cookie with a small amount of the mixture. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 minutes, or until cookies are lightly browned. Makes 5 dozen.
